visual_description: A man in a light-colored shirt and dark vest is seen from behind, peering cautiously through horizontal blinds. He raises his right hand to his face, partially obscuring his view, while his left hand rests near his side. The scene is dimly lit, suggesting an indoor or nighttime setting with limited visibility.
